title: Wrong runtime output on small combinational circuit

features.name: bitwise NOT on concatenation
features.description: Code should include a bitwise NOT operator applied to a concatenation expression with mixed-width operands

features.name: XOR with concatenation operand
features.description: Code should include a binary XOR operator where one operand is a concatenation of multi-bit and single-bit values
features.snippet:
bit [3:0] celloutsig_1z;
assign celloutsig_1z = in_data[18:15] ^ { in_data[42:40], 1'b1 };

features.name: assign signal used in another assign concatenation
features.description: Code should include a signal assigned via assign that is subsequently used inside a concatenation expression within another assign statement
